caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a logo, and black over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a recording studio or podcast space featuring dark, sound-absorbing acoustic foam panels on the wall behind him. The microphone, which is held by a shock mount and an adjustable arm labeled "Blue," is positioned directly in front of his face. As the scene progresses, the man is seen gesturing with his right hand, moving it from the left side of the frame toward the center. His facial expressions change slightly as he speaks, and his right arm, which has a tattoo on the bicep, remains visible as he moves. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man and the surrounding recording equipment throughout the sequence.
